content.passage:
LIBRARY NOTICE
All books borrowed during the summer must be returned by September 5th. Late returns will result in a fine of £1 per week.

options.label: A
options.text: The library will be closed during summer.

options.label: B
options.text: You will be charged if summer books are returned late.

options.label: C
options.text: Books cannot be borrowed during the summer.

explanation_zh: 通知说明暑期借阅的书籍必须在9月5日前归还，逾期每周罚款1英镑。因此选B——如果暑期借的书逾期归还会被收费。
explanation_en: The notice states that books borrowed during summer must be returned by September 5th, and late returns will incur a £1 per week fine. So the answer is B.

content.stem: What is the purpose of this email?
content.passage:
Hi Tom,
Just a reminder that the school trip to the Science Museum has been moved from Thursday to Friday. Please bring your signed permission form by Wednesday at the latest.
Mrs. Clark

options.label: A
options.text: To inform Tom about a change in the trip date.

options.label: B
options.text: To ask Tom to visit the Science Museum.

options.label: C
options.text: To tell Tom the trip has been cancelled.

explanation_zh: 邮件内容是通知Tom学校去科学博物馆的旅行从周四改到了周五。所以这封邮件的目的是告知行程日期变更，选A。
explanation_en: The email informs Tom that the school trip has been moved from Thursday to Friday, so its purpose is to inform about a date change. Answer: A.

content.passage:
SWIMMING POOL
Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult at all times.

options.label: A
options.text: Children under 12 cannot use the pool.

options.label: B
options.text: Adults must stay with young children in the pool area.

options.label: C
options.text: The pool is only for adults.

explanation_zh: 标志说12岁以下儿童必须始终有成人陪同。这意味着成年人必须和小孩待在泳池区域，选B。
explanation_en: The sign says children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult at all times, meaning adults must stay with young children. Answer: B.

content.stem: What does Sarah want Ben to do?
content.passage:
Ben,
Could you pick up my jacket from the dry cleaner's on your way home? It should be ready after 4 pm. I've already paid for it.
Thanks, Sarah

options.label: A
options.text: Pay for the jacket at the dry cleaner's.

options.label: B
options.text: Take her jacket to the dry cleaner's.

options.label: C
options.text: Collect her jacket from the dry cleaner's.

explanation_zh: Sarah让Ben在回家路上从干洗店取她的夹克，已经付过钱了。所以是让Ben去取（collect）夹克，选C。
explanation_en: Sarah asks Ben to pick up (collect) her jacket from the dry cleaner's on his way home. She has already paid. Answer: C.

content.passage:
GRAND OPENING SALE
All sports shoes 30% off this weekend only!
Free pair of socks with every purchase over £50.

options.label: A
options.text: A discount on all items in the shop.

options.label: B
options.text: Reduced prices on sports shoes and a gift for large orders.

options.label: C
options.text: Free sports shoes for the first 50 customers.

explanation_zh: 商店广告显示运动鞋打七折（30% off），消费超过50英镑还送一双袜子。所以是运动鞋降价+大额消费有赠品，选B。
explanation_en: The shop offers 30% off sports shoes and free socks for purchases over £50 — reduced prices on sports shoes plus a gift for larger orders. Answer: B.
